description: Genius of Liberty PUBLISHED IJY THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE ILLINOIS ANTISLAVERY SOC1ETX li We hold these truths to be selfevident that all men are created equal and endowed by their Creator with certain inalienable rights that among these are lift liberty P Yol I LOWELL LA SALLE COUNTY ILLINOIS SATURDAY NOVEMBER 27 1841 IVo 37 H WARREN Z EASTMAN Editors and Publishing Agents TermsTwo Dollars por annum in advance Subscriptions for six months will be received at the same rate Quarterly subscriptions will be received a1 50 cents each provided companies shall be formed to take no less than 10 copies and payment ac company the order 07 Advertisements will be inserted at the usual prices 07 All letters must be directed postpaid to the Editors of the Genius of Liberty Vcrmil ionmlle La Salle County Illinois 07 Postmasters are authorized to enclose money for subscribers in letters to Publishers of newspapers and frank the same if signed by themselves AGENTS The following persons are authorized to re ceive subscriptions for the Genius of Liberty ILLINOIS Madison Purley James G Dunlavy Samuel It Lewis James G Laughlin Rev O Lovejoy Florid Putnam Co Union Grove 44 Magnolia 44 Granville
